news.t: Sound Income to Change Listing Exchange of ETFs to NYSE

holdings.infoBox: DIVY is an equity ETF with a total of 29 individual holdings. The top holdings are Omnicom Group stock at 5.45%, Principal Financial Group at 4.78%, Eversource Energy at 4.64%, United Parcel Service at 4.54%, and GSK plc at 4.48%.

overview.description: The Sound Equity Dividend Income ETF (DIVY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund is an actively managed, narrow portfolio, of US large- and mid-cap stocks, fundamentally selected for capital appreciation and dividend yield. DIVY was launched on Dec 30, 2020 and is issued by Tidal.

data.title: Sound Income to Change Listing Exchange of ETFs to NYSE
data.text: NEW YORK, June 14, 2024 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Tidal Investments LLC (“Tidal”) announced today that Sound Income, a renowned asset management firm, will change the listing exchange for shares of each of ...
